name: Premium Wireless Headphones
description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and premium sound quality. Perfect for music lovers and professionals.

name: Smart Fitness Watch
description: Track your fitness goals with this advanced smartwatch. Features heart rate monitoring, GPS, sleep tracking, and 7-day battery life.

name: Professional Camera Kit
description: Complete camera kit including body, 2 lenses, and accessories. Perfect for photography enthusiasts and professionals.

name: Ergonomic Office Chair
description: Premium ergonomic chair with lumbar support, adjustable armrests, and breathable mesh backing. Perfect for long work hours.

name: Ultrabook Laptop
description: Lightweight and powerful laptop with 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, and 12th gen Intel Core i7 processor. Perfect for work and entertainment.

name: Smart Home Hub
description: Central control for your smart home devices. Compatible with lights, thermostats, security cameras, and more.

name: Yoga Mat Premium
description: Extra thick, non-slip yoga mat with carrying strap. Perfect for yoga, pilates, and floor exercises.

name: Gourmet Coffee Maker
description: Programmable coffee maker with built-in grinder. Brew the perfect cup every time with 12-cup capacity.
